--- title: Getting Started with Nautilus Cluster description: Learn how to access, use, and optimize the Nautilus Research Platform (NRP) for your computational needs. --- import { LinkCard, CardGrid } from '@astrojs/starlight/components'; {/* This is a comment in mdx - 🚀 [Get access to Nautilus](/documentation/userdocs/start/getting-started/) - 📖 [Learn to use the cluster](/documentation/userdocs/tutorial/basic/) - 🖥️ [Install tools](/documentation/userdocs/start/getting-started/) - 🛡️ [Cluster policies](/documentation/userdocs/start/policies/) - ❓ [FAQ](/documentation/userdocs/start/faq/) - 📇 [Contact us](/contact/) - 🆘 [Asking for support](/documentation/userdocs/start/support/) --> */} ### Disclaimers

The National Research Platform currently has no storage that is suitable for HIPAA, PID, FISMA, FERPA, or protected data of any kind. Users are not permitted to store such data on NRP machines.

### Start using the cluster
